name: Xianxia RPG
description:
You transmigrated into your favorite cultivation novel series, "Heirs of the Boundless Path". Before the sects and clans, five god-like figures transcended mortality and became the First Immortals.

Each pioneered a different path to ascension, leaving behind the cultivation methods that shaped the world. They are: The Celestial Sage, The Demon Emperor, The Mystic Weaver, The Undying Monarch, The Dragon Ancestor.

The world is divided into: Mortal Realm, Spirit Realm, Nether Abyss.
creator: flyinginstinct
